ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger (male or female) */,
  "months_on_board" INTEGER /* Number of months the passenger has been on board */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (1 for survived, 0 for not survived) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "country_of_residence" TEXT /* Country where the passenger resides */,
  "boarding_port" TEXT /* Port where the passenger boarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Port of departure */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the cruise */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the voyage in days */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the voyage occurred */,
  "cruise_line" TEXT /* Name of the cruise line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage it relates to */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the voyage in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the voyage in percentage */,
  "wave_height" REAL /* Average wave height during the voyage in meters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the voyage in km/h */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weather */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety protocol */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific voyage */,
  "protocol_type" TEXT /* Type of safety protocol (e.g., Drill, Emergency Response) */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the protocol was implemented */,
  "protocol_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the safety protocol */,
  "staff_involved" TEXT /* Staff members involved in the protocol */,
  "passenger_participation" INTEGER /* Number of passengers participating in the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_protocols_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic record */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage being analyzed */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the voyage */,
  "survived_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers who survived */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Calculated survival rate as a percentage */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the passengers (e.g., 20-30, 30-40) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passengers (male or female) */,
  "survival_factor" TEXT /* Factors contributing to survival (e.g., life jacket usage, prompt evacuation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Summer, Winter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "seasonal_characteristics" TEXT /* Typical weather and sea conditions during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the passenger (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the passenger (e.g., high school, college, university) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger (e.g., student, working professional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Captain, Safety Officer) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member (e.g., operations, HR) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member (e.g., Captain, Officer) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., incident, routine) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of any incidents */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed notes and observations from the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyage_reports_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency contact */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact person */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the contact to the passenger */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact person */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Address of the emergency contact person */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "alternate_contact" TEXT /* Alternate contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_contacts_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger providing feedback */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the passenger */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of feedback (e.g., service, amenities) */,
  "satisfaction_level" TEXT /* Level of satisfaction (e.g., satisfied, dissatisfied) */,
  "follow_up_action" TEXT /* Action taken in response to feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member associated with this account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the access occurred */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
